title: argemone munita var. argentea
intro: Argemone munita var. argentea, also known as silver prickly poppy, is a variety of the Argemone munita plant, a flowering plant in the poppy family. The plant contains a number of medicinal compounds, including alkaloids like protopine and sanguinarine, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Argemone munita var. argentea are said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. It is traditionally used to treat various health problems, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and is often prepared as a tincture or tea for consumption.
